metadata.description: Use when reviewing, troubleshooting, or planning Cisco network operations work across IOS XE, NX-OS, IOS XR, and adjacent Cisco platforms; diagnoses change safety, platform mismatch, routing, switching, HA, policy, observability, and automation risks.

plugins.name: cisco-network-ops-skill
plugins.description: Diagnose-first Cisco network operations guidance for change safety, troubleshooting, and automation review.
